style: AAA / cinematic game foley — the quality bar is top-tier console/film sound design (think Zelda, God of War, Lord of the Rings), NOT retro chiptune. Realistic, layered, punchy, production-clean one-shots.

procedural.note: REJECTED (v1). DrPetter's sfxr chiptune synth. Retained ONLY as an offline placeholder for pipeline testing (`--engine placeholder`). Its output is 8-bit-bleep quality and must never be shipped. See README post-mortem.

ai.note: REQUIRED engine. ElevenLabs SFX v2 (2026 quality leader for realistic foley). Requests high-bitrate MP3 (this key tier delivers MP3, not lossless PCM); the factory decodes via ffmpeg and masters to a clean 48 kHz WAV. Needs ELEVENLABS_API_KEY.
ai.prompt_directives: High-fidelity recorded foley, close-miked, crisp transient, rich body, natural short tail; single isolated sound; dry with only a subtle natural room; no music, no voice, no melody, no chiptune, no synth beeps, no background noise; broadcast-quality, production-ready

catalog.name: Coin Pickup
catalog.description: a bright, short metallic jingle played when the player picks up a gold coin
catalog.ai_prompt: A single gold coin collected: a bright, clean metallic ting with a fast attack and a short shimmering ring-out, small and satisfying
catalog.usage: Play on gold_coin / gold_ingot pickup and shop sales.

catalog.name: Gem Pickup
catalog.description: a sparkly ascending chime for collecting a gem or valuable
catalog.ai_prompt: Picking up a precious gemstone: a crystalline glassy chime with a delicate sparkling upward shimmer, jewel-like and magical yet grounded
catalog.usage: Play on gem_ruby and other high-value pickups.

catalog.name: Item Get
catalog.description: a cheerful little fanfare for receiving a new item into the inventory
catalog.ai_prompt: Receiving an important item: a warm, triumphant short orchestral-tinged flourish with a soft harp/bell sparkle, rewarding and premium
catalog.usage: Play when a tool or item enters the inventory.

catalog.name: Menu Select
catalog.description: a soft neutral blip when moving the cursor between menu options
catalog.ai_prompt: A refined UI cursor move: a soft, tactile muted wooden-and-glass click, subtle and premium, very short
catalog.usage: Cursor movement in menus and dialogs.

catalog.name: Menu Confirm
catalog.description: a bright positive blip confirming a menu choice
catalog.ai_prompt: A UI confirmation: a clean, positive soft chime with a gentle glassy ring, satisfying and modern
catalog.usage: Confirming/accepting a selection.

catalog.name: Menu Cancel
catalog.description: a low descending blip for backing out or cancelling
catalog.ai_prompt: A UI back/cancel: a soft muted low click with a short downward tone, understated and clean
catalog.usage: Cancel / back / close a menu.

catalog.name: Error Buzz
catalog.description: a short harsh buzz signalling an invalid or blocked action
catalog.ai_prompt: An invalid-action cue: a soft, muted low double-thud denial, tasteful and non-harsh, not a harsh electronic buzz
catalog.usage: Invalid action, not enough money, blocked placement.

catalog.name: Notification
catalog.description: a gentle two-note tone announcing a notification or new message
catalog.ai_prompt: A gentle notification: a warm, rounded two-note bell tone with a soft tail, pleasant and unobtrusive
catalog.usage: New chat message / quest notification.

catalog.name: Chest Open
catalog.description: a rising creak-and-clunk as a wooden chest is opened
catalog.ai_prompt: A heavy wooden treasure chest opening: creaking oak hinges, a solid iron latch clunk, wood settling, then a faint magical shimmer of treasure inside
catalog.usage: Opening wooden_chest / containers.

catalog.name: Chest Close
catalog.description: a short wooden thud as a chest lid closes
catalog.ai_prompt: A heavy wooden chest lid closing: a solid deep wooden thud with an iron latch click and a short low resonance
catalog.usage: Closing wooden_chest / containers.

catalog.name: Key Unlock
catalog.description: a metallic click-clunk of a key turning in a lock
catalog.ai_prompt: An iron key turning a lock: metallic tumblers clicking, the key scraping, a firm mechanism clunk as it unlocks, weighty and detailed
catalog.usage: Using iron_key / unlocking a door or chest.

catalog.name: Drink Potion
catalog.description: a bubbly gulp-and-sparkle of drinking a potion
catalog.ai_prompt: Drinking a potion: a cork pop, several liquid glugs of swallowing, then a soft magical restorative shimmer
catalog.usage: Consuming a potion / healing item.

catalog.name: Eat Food
catalog.description: a soft munch-and-satisfied blip of eating food
catalog.ai_prompt: Eating food: a couple of soft organic bites and chews with subtle mouth foley, then a small satisfied cue, natural and not cartoonish
catalog.usage: Eating a food item to restore energy.

catalog.name: Sword Swing
catalog.description: a quick whoosh of a sword swung through the air
catalog.ai_prompt: A steel sword swung fast through the air: a sharp, weighty whoosh with an airy metallic edge, no impact
catalog.usage: Swinging the sword (miss / wind-up).

catalog.name: Sword Hit
catalog.description: a sharp metallic clang of a sword striking a target
catalog.ai_prompt: A steel sword striking metal armor: a bright, heavy metallic clang with a sharp transient and a short ringing tail, forceful impact
catalog.usage: Sword connecting with an enemy or object.

catalog.name: Axe Chop
catalog.description: a heavy wooden thock of an axe biting into a tree
catalog.ai_prompt: An axe biting deep into wood: a heavy, meaty wooden thock with splintering, solid and impactful
catalog.usage: Chopping oak_tree / pine_tree with the axe.

catalog.name: Pickaxe Hit
catalog.description: a sharp stony crack of a pickaxe striking rock
catalog.ai_prompt: A pickaxe striking solid rock: a sharp, hard stone impact with a bright metallic ping and small gravel debris scatter
catalog.usage: Mining rock / ore with the pickaxe.

catalog.name: Hoe Till
catalog.description: a gritty dig of a hoe breaking soil
catalog.ai_prompt: A hoe breaking soil: a gritty, earthy dig with clods of dirt crumbling and a short scrape, natural farm foley
catalog.usage: Tilling a soil tile with the hoe.

catalog.name: Watering Can
catalog.description: a soft splash of water poured from a watering can
catalog.ai_prompt: Water poured from a watering can onto soil: a gentle, even sprinkling shower of droppets pattering on earth, soft and wet
catalog.usage: Watering crops with the watering can.

catalog.name: Footstep (Grass)
catalog.description: a soft muffled step on grass
catalog.ai_prompt: A single footstep on grass: a soft, muffled organic step with subtle blades rustling, close and natural
catalog.usage: Per-step while walking on grass/foliage tiles.

catalog.name: Footstep (Stone)
catalog.description: a crisp tap of a step on stone or pavement
catalog.ai_prompt: A single footstep on stone pavement: a crisp, hard leather-on-stone tap with a tight natural room, close and clean
catalog.usage: Per-step while walking on stone/path tiles.

catalog.name: Footstep (Wood)
catalog.description: a hollow knock of a step on a wooden floor
catalog.ai_prompt: A single footstep on a wooden floor: a hollow, resonant boot on timber creak-thud, close and warm
catalog.usage: Per-step while walking on wood/bridge tiles.

catalog.name: Jump
catalog.description: a short upward blip as the character hops
catalog.ai_prompt: A character hop/jump: a soft cloth-and-body effort with a light launch whoosh, grounded and organic, no cartoon boing
catalog.usage: Character jump / hop.

catalog.name: Water Splash
catalog.description: a wet splash of stepping or falling into water
catalog.ai_prompt: A body/foot entering water: a rich, wet splash with droplet spray and a short bubbling settle, full-bodied
catalog.usage: Entering water / fishing bobber landing.

catalog.name: Take Damage
catalog.description: a short pained grunt-blip when the player takes damage
catalog.ai_prompt: A character taking a physical hit: a dull, meaty body impact thud with a subtle cloth/armor rustle, visceral but not gory
catalog.usage: Player / entity takes damage.

catalog.name: Enemy Defeat
catalog.description: a descending puff as an enemy is defeated and vanishes
catalog.ai_prompt: An enemy defeated and collapsing: a heavy impact followed by a body/armor collapse and a short low descending magical dissipation
catalog.usage: Enemy defeated / despawns.

catalog.name: Explosion
catalog.description: a punchy boom for bombs and destructible objects
catalog.ai_prompt: A cinematic explosion: a deep punchy sub-heavy blast with a sharp crack, debris scatter and a rumbling tail, powerful and full
catalog.usage: Bombs, barrels, destructibles breaking.

catalog.name: Magic Cast
catalog.description: a shimmering rising sweep of casting a spell
catalog.ai_prompt: Casting a fantasy spell: a shimmering rising swell of magical energy with sparkling harmonics and a soft whoosh release, ethereal and rich
catalog.usage: Casting a spell / using magic.

catalog.name: Level Up
catalog.description: a bright ascending fanfare for gaining a level
catalog.ai_prompt: A level-up reward: a bright, uplifting ascending magical arpeggio with warm bells and a shimmering sparkle, celebratory and premium
catalog.usage: Player gains a level / skill increases.

catalog.name: Quest Complete
catalog.description: a triumphant little jingle marking a completed quest
catalog.ai_prompt: A quest completed: a short warm triumphant orchestral flourish with a bell/harp resolve, satisfying and rewarding
catalog.usage: Completing a quest / objective.

quality_target: Best-in-class. Every shipped clip must be indistinguishable from professionally recorded/edited foley. No 8-bit, no bleeps, no synth artifacts.
